name: bigliner
description: Local-first AI gateway: 100+ providers, unified API key, smart routing, real-time analytics, and an animated dashboard.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.start: npm run build -w web && npm run start -w server
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w server && npm run lint -w web
